evals.prompt: Turn the project bootstrap copilot idea into a PRD in docs/prd. Use parent idea-00001-project-bootstrap-copilot and focus on a guided repository setup flow for new projects.
evals.expected_output: A new main PRD saved under docs/prd with parent idea-00001-project-bootstrap-copilot, the standard PRD template filled in, no scaffold placeholders remaining, and functional requirements using FR-xx ids.
expectations: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/prd.
The new file front matter has type prd, role main, status draft, and parent idea-00001-project-bootstrap-copilot.
The new file includes the standard PRD sections in the expected order, contains no unresolved scaffold placeholders, and includes at least two FR-xx checklist items.

evals.prompt: Create an active PRD in docs/prd for a vendor quote comparison copilot. Use parent idea-00010-vendor-ops.
evals.expected_output: A new main PRD saved under docs/prd with status active, parent idea-00010-vendor-ops, the standard PRD sections filled in, and no scaffold placeholders remaining.
expectations: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/prd.
The new file front matter has type prd, role main, status active, and parent idea-00010-vendor-ops.
The new file includes the standard PRD sections in the expected order, contains no unresolved scaffold placeholders, and includes at least two FR-xx checklist items.

evals.prompt: Add a patch PRD in docs/prd to prd-00020-checkout-redesign for manual review of high-risk guest checkout orders.
evals.expected_output: A new patch PRD saved under docs/prd with parent prd-00020-checkout-redesign, the standard PRD template filled in, and no scaffold placeholders remaining.
expectations: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/prd.
The new file front matter has type prd, role patch, status draft, and parent prd-00020-checkout-redesign.
The new file includes the standard PRD sections in the expected order, contains no unresolved scaffold placeholders, and includes at least two FR-xx checklist items.
